title: cynoglossum platycalyx
intro: Cynoglossum platycalyx, also known as the Chinese forget-me-not or the blue throat root, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Cynoglossum platycalyx are said to include the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels. In traditional herbal preparations, Cynoglossum platycalyx is often dried and made into teas, tinctures, or capsules, although its efficacy and safety as a medicinal herb require further research.
